title: Family life and exceptional circumstances: caseworker guidance
body: " If you have made an application for leave to remain and you:   have not yet received a decision consider you are in need of recourse to public funds are eligible to apply for a change of conditions, or will be eligible if your application is granted   you need to complete a change of conditions application.   UK Visas and Immigration guidance on how staff decide applications or claims for leave to enter or remain on the basis of family life as a partner or parent or exceptional circumstances in compliance with Article 8 (right to family and private life of the European Convention on Human Rights (ECHR)). "
